release_packaging_note: Absolute local paths and credential/payload-shaped fields were sanitized. See manifests/source_to_release_map.csv for source and release hashes.

rules.exact_text_eligibility: NFC-normalized, outer-whitespace-stripped version A and B strings must both have identical SHA-256 hashes
rules.failed_retry_handling: exclude all unsuccessful or unparsed call attempts; retain a provider-item only when exactly one successful parsed HTTP-200 result is present
rules.quality_direction: compare the unweighted mean of FA/CC/LC/TF/MQ
rules.successful_row: parse_success=True, HTTP 200, and all six score dimensions nonmissing
